message:
chore(beads): sync issue store — incremental updates from live planning pass

Flush local beads state for frankensqlite into issues.jsonl. Captures
incremental planning-pass edits across in-flight subtasks (status
transitions, acceptance-criteria tweaks, label additions, dependency
edges) that have accumulated since the last sync.

Mechanical export via `br sync --flush-only`; no code change, no
behavior change. Needed so that other agents cloning the repo see
the same ready-work graph that `br ready` / `bv --robot-triage`
present locally on this machine.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
